---
title: "journal"
author: "Hayden Simm"
date: "2026-03-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

We are deciding to work in the tidyverse, so we loading in the data using "read_csv" 

plan to do a MANOVA to determine the relationship between predictors(dose and genotype) and the responses (survival, hatch, and abnormalities) ?- count data

https://pubs.acs.org/doi/full/10.1021/acs.est.7b04099: write something about how we referenced literature to decide that dose and dpf are factors.

should we do the pairwise comparisons with the behaviour data?- continuous data
